frontmatter.title: rambling - sample workflow
frontmatter.summary: a slightly more simple approach to using samples.

content:
# Gathering and Organizing Samples for a New Workflow.

Recently, I sold a Polyend Tracker Mini. I really did enjoy everything about the device and workflow outside of the input. Polyend makes an excellent product. I was jealous of the jog wheel and pads on the Tracker+, but I made my $800 bed and I was about to at least try to lay in it. Trying to sell anything for even 3/4 full price right now is a 1/2 inch pipe dreak. And after realizing it would just eventually end up in the aspiration graveyard, I let it go on
